description: Fetches the list of projects from Dokploy using the configured API endpoint.
goal: Validate API connectivity and return project metadata.

task_template.title: List Dokploy projects
task_template.description: Validate Dokploy API connectivity by listing visible projects.

doc.summary: Use the low-risk Dokploy list-projects scenario to validate API connectivity.
doc.scope: Dokploy project listing only; no deployment mutation.
doc.plan: Resolve Dokploy credentials, invoke the list-projects scenario, and summarize returned project metadata.
doc.verify_steps: Confirm the dokploy recipe resolves and the scenario returns projects.
doc.rollback_plan: No remote mutation is expected; remove temporary run artifacts if created.
doc.findings: Record missing credentials, API authorization failures, or unreachable endpoint details.
